breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's two 11.78 Hz derivations collapse to one: v_a/c = r_disc/disc_thickness by construction
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: WIN-001 analysis now shows the dome's live-power f=v_a/(2×r_disc) formula is mathematically identical to its wins.html f=c/(2D) formula — v_a=πc/2 and r_disc=π×R_earth, so both reduce to the same Earth-sphere identity. Additionally, applying v_a to WIN-029 (same claimed aetheric circuit) shifts the firmament height 66% beyond the dome's published value, exposing per-WIN parameter fitting.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Closes a major loophole: defenders could claim our rebuttal attacked the wrong formula. Now both formulas are shown to be identical, and the cross-WIN inconsistency quantified.
